art_a: The sentence contains at least one digit.
TT: My 3 dogs ran across the yard this morning.
I saw 7 owls perched on the old fence last night.
We caught 2 salmon during our fishing trip yesterday.
The cat knocked over 4 cups before breakfast.
There were 5 horses grazing in the field at noon.
She adopted 1 puppy from the shelter on Saturday.
About 12 ducks swam past our boat near the dock.
My neighbor keeps 6 chickens in her backyard coop.
I spotted 3 rabbits hiding under the bushes today.
The zoo welcomed 2 baby elephants in 2023.
We counted 9 sheep on the hillside this afternoon.
His parrot learned 8 new words over the weekend.
A group of 15 deer crossed the road at dawn.
I fed 4 goldfish before leaving for school.
FF: Please remember to buy some bread on your way home.
I think we should leave around seven in the morning.
She painted the kitchen a lovely shade of yellow.
My phone battery died right before the meeting started.
Let's grab a cup of coffee before work tomorrow.
The weather has been surprisingly warm for this time of year.
He forgot his umbrella, so he got soaked walking home.
We watched a great movie at the theater last night.
Could you please turn down the music a little?
I finally finished reading that book you recommended.
The bakery on the corner makes the best cinnamon rolls.
She studied all weekend for her final exams.
Our flight got delayed by almost three hours.
I really need to clean out the garage this weekend.
TF: I woke up at 6 this morning feeling refreshed.
We need to buy 3 loaves of bread today.
The meeting got moved to 2 in the afternoon.
She turned 25 last weekend and threw a party.
FT: The dog barked loudly at the mailman this morning.
Two cats curled up together on the warm windowsill.
An owl hooted softly somewhere in the dark forest.
She fed the horses some fresh hay before breakfast.
